title: duplicated libc env helpers are a silent divergence risk
description: libc_setenv and libc_unsetenv are byte-for-byte duplicated between wolftpm/src/device.rs and wolftpm-tss/src/connection.rs with a comment saying 'fix it in both files.' A future contributor who finds a bug (e.g. missing overwrite=1 flag on setenv) will fix one copy and not the other. The duplication comment is the only protection against drift — it won't be read by a contributor who does not search both files. Maintenance consequence: class of bugs where the two copies diverge silently.
